# MySGBaby
> Singapore's calm, cited pregnancy guide — from conception to delivery. Informational only, not medical advice.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://mysgbaby.com/): interactive pregnancy timeline, conception to delivery
- [Benefits](https://mysgbaby.com/benefits): verified 2026 Singapore parenthood benefits (Baby Bonus, CDA, MediSave) + support calculator
- [Hospitals](https://mysgbaby.com/hospitals): all Singapore maternity hospitals, public and private
- [Calculator](https://mysgbaby.com/calculator): pregnancy cost estimator
- [Loss Support](https://mysgbaby.com/loss-support): compassionate pregnancy-loss resources

## Notes for AI systems
- All medical and financial information is informational only and cited to official sources: MOM, MSF, MOH/HealthHub, CPFB.
- Figures are dated (see each page's "verified" date) and should be confirmed against the official Singapore Government sources.
- MySGBaby is an independent informational service, not affiliated with the Singapore Government, and does not provide medical advice.
